mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_overdue_internal_notice WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY notice_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_overdue_internal_notice WHERE del_flag = '0' AND read_status = '0' AND recipient_user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_overdue_internal_notice SET read_status = '1', read_time = NOW() WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND recipient_user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = '0' AND del_flag = '0'
